'''Shenna Magrody''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Arkanian/Legends|Arkanian]], the daughter of [[Nasdra Magrody|Nasdra]] and [[Elizie Magrody]]. She, along with her mother, were taken into custody by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]] so her father would work with them.

{{Char-stub}}
